repo_prior_art.cite: pid_manski1990test concerns Manski-style bounded-outcome inequalities, not generalized-Roy common-law response-array pasting.

published_prior_art.cite: fan_guerre_zhu_2017_joint_po_functionals studies joint-potential-outcome functionals; tan_blanchet_syrgkanis_2026_prte_ot gives generalized-Roy CCOT, but neither supplies this finite rank-structured common-law pasting formulation.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue generalized-Roy factual-map audit.

published_prior_art.cite: This is a direct K=1 specialization of the generalized-Roy factual map in tan_blanchet_syrgkanis_2026_prte_ot.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_manski1990test is a bounded-outcome Manski artifact and contains no IV/OT gain-band association-loss frontier.

published_prior_art.cite: tan_blanchet_syrgkanis_2026_prte_ot treats generalized-Roy CCOT with analytic product-cost reductions; masten_poirier_2020_breakdown_frontiers supplies the closest sensitivity-frontier antecedent, but neither states this common-law nonseparable gain-band frontier.
tan_blanchet_syrgkanis_2026_prte_ot establishes the separable/product-cost reduction nested by the additive-cost specialization.

per_theorem_calls.label: Open-ended Question 2 (orthogonal inference for sign radius)

repo_prior_art.cite: none; the active catalogue has no LP-dual inference result for generalized-Roy generated cutpoints.

published_prior_art.cite: ober_reynolds_2023_joint_po_ot gives dual-OT root-n inference and fang_santos_2019_directional_inference gives the nonregular directional framework; their combination does not cover generated generalized-Roy cutpoints and this sign-radius functional.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / technical_internal_limitation
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Finite outcome, resistance, instrument, and covariate grids; saturated cutpoint coverage; both rank-shape restrictions; and the calibrated rank-association floor are maintained model restrictions.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The identified-set interval and association-loss frontier are sharp only under the displayed finite-grid generalized-Roy rank-association sensitivity model.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 2 / honest_scope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Root-n regularity, cutpoint stability, primal-dual uniqueness, and tie-robust directional inference remain open rather than being assumed as conclusions of the identification result.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Inference is conditional on derived primitive regularity conditions and remains a separate open-ended question.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a worked nondegenerate finite instance that computes the gain-band interval and epsilon-dagger, and shows a strict gap from separately assembled marginal extrema.
State an explicit observable-law family on which the nonseparable gain-band endpoint differs from the Tan--Blanchet--Syrgkanis additive/product-cost reduction.
Specify a concrete primitive cutpoint-margin condition and nuisance-rate regime for the dual-inference question.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with the headline bound explicitly retained as conditional on the finite-grid generalized-Roy rank-association model.
